# look configuration
# Generated by Look. Edit values below, then press Save Config to apply.

# Indexing
file_scan_roots=Desktop,Documents,Downloads,Pictures,Videos
file_scan_extra_roots=
file_scan_depth=4
file_scan_limit=8000
file_exclude_paths=
lazy_indexing_enabled=true
skip_dir_names=node_modules,target,build,dist,.git,vendor,out,coverage,tmp,cache,venv

# Arch (and other affected stacks) - workarounds for WebKitGTK ghost rendering
# arch_disable_gpu=true forces HardwareAccelerationPolicy::Never on the webview;
# arch_disable_blur=true drops backdrop-filter and forces an opaque tint (same
# behavior as the Hyprland fallback). Both default off; flip if you see slider
# trails or overlapping popovers. arch_disable_gpu requires restart.
arch_disable_gpu=false
arch_disable_blur=false

# Running apps switcher: none, right
running_apps_placement=right

# Web answers - show an inline answer card for question-like queries
# (currency/weather/crypto via the network, Wikipedia/DuckDuckGo lookups,
# and Google autocomplete suggestions). Set to false to disable all network
# answer features and run fully offline.
#
# Note: there is no on-device LLM on Linux/Windows - Apple Intelligence is
# macOS-only. The key stays named `ai_enabled` to share config storage with
# the macOS app (where it gates both web answers AND the on-device model).
ai_enabled=true

# UI theme
ui_theme=
